name: aid-browser-extension
description: Cross-browser extension that docks a ChatGPT-style side panel with interchangeable LLM backends

scripts.build:chrome: tsc && vite build && npm run validate:build
scripts.build:firefox: tsc && node build-firefox.js && npm run validate:build
scripts.package: npm run package:chrome && npm run package:firefox && npm run check:artifacts
scripts.package:chrome: npm run build:chrome && node tools/package-extension.js chrome
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && node tools/package-extension.js firefox
scripts.release:check: npm run release:version:check && npm run lint && npm run type-check && npm test && npm run test:e2e && npm run package
scripts.publish:chrome:store: npm run release:version:tag-check && npm run package:chrome && node tools/assert-store-env.js chrome && node tools/publish-chrome-web-store.js --publish
scripts.publish:firefox:amo: npm run release:version:tag-check && npm run build:firefox && node tools/assert-store-env.js firefox && node tools/publish-firefox-amo.js
scripts.test:e2e:live:lmstudio: npm run build:chrome && playwright test tests/e2e/lmstudio-live.spec.ts --timeout=180000
scripts.test:e2e:live:ollama: npm run build:chrome && playwright test tests/e2e/ollama-live.spec.ts --timeout=180000
